one_time_description: Audit qualified due to exclusion of Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company from consolidation (GBEs). If included, accumulated surplus would increase by $215,628,277. Also qualified re: unrecorded liability of $8,080,380 for overpaid royalties judgment.
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business entities including gas bar, real estate, automotive, bingo, food services (Subway, Robins Donuts), art gallery, ambulance authority, medical services, and construction. Two excluded GBEs: Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company.
notes: Audit is qualified on three bases: (1) Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company excluded from consolidation as GBEs - if included accumulated surplus would increase by $215,628,277; (2) unrecorded liability of $8,080,380 for overpaid royalties judgment under appeal; (3) ARO liabilities under PS 3280 not identified, scope limitation. Financial statements restated December 15, 2023 per Note 27. Accumulated surplus on balance sheet of $668,924,220 includes $41,657,909 of accumulated remeasurement gains; accumulated surplus per operations statement is $627,266,311. Nation has large trust fund assets: Kisoniyaminaw Heritage Trust Fund $523M and Nipisihkopahk Iyinisiwin Trust Fund $35.6M. Prior year accumulated surplus includes remeasurement gains.
